title: cacalia subacuminata
intro: Cacalia subacuminata, also known as Japanese puccoon or Japanese Indian cup plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cacalia subacuminata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and infusates, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
